t_en: That cold, aloof stranger... just being in the same space with them is enough to make me suffocate.

t_ch: 树庭……
t_en: The Grove...

t_ch: 连圣树的枝叶都被染成了金色，为了{NICKNAME}，白厄倾注了全力。
t_en: Even the branches and leaves of the sacred tree have been dyed gold. Phainon gave his all for {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 既然「毁灭」已将忆潮彻底驱散，该深入其中了。
t_en: Now that the Destruction has quelled the memoria tide, it's time for me to go deeper into the Grove.
...Awoo!

t_ch: 谁在那？！
t_en: Who's there!?

t_ch: 那道烈焰，烧毁了树庭，惊扰了众生的沉眠……
t_en: That fiery blaze engulfed the Grove and woke all creatures from their slumber...

t_ch: 而你，天外来客…你甚至无意聆听「大地」的悲鸣。
t_en: And you, visitor from beyond the sky... You have no intention of listening to the cries of the "Earth."

t_ch: 你是……
t_en: You are...?

t_ch: 很意外么？金血、半神，并不为{RUBY_B#人类}刻法勒之子{RUBY_E#}独有。吉奥利亚的子嗣，自当成为它的脊梁。
t_en: Are you surprised? Demigods with golden blood are not solely limited to {RUBY_B#humans}Kephale's children{RUBY_E#}. Is it not natural that the offspring of Georios would take on their duty?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我乃荒笛，大地之化身，万千生灵的守护神。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I am Terravox, avatar of the earth, divine protector of the myriad living beings.</color>

t_ch: 真是无巧不成书，刚有人提醒我要注意你。
t_en: What a coincidence. I was just told by someone to watch out for you.

t_ch: 回答我：神话中的地兽之王，理应陨落的半神，为何会以人形现身？
t_en: Answer me: Why would the Dromas King of the legends, the demigod who should have fallen, appear in a humanoid form?

t_ch: 明知故问：那<color=#dbc291ff>化龙妙法</color>不正是你的看家本领么，「不朽」的后裔？
t_en: You already know the answer: Is the <color=#dbc291ff>Transmutation Arcanum</color> not precisely your specialty, descendant of the Permanence?

t_ch: 你怎么会知道……
t_en: How do you know about...

t_ch: 是「三月七」？
t_en: Was it "March 7th"?

t_ch: 没错。拜她所赐，我才能遁入忆潮，从世人的记忆中消失。
t_en: Exactly. Thanks to her, I was able to escape into the memoria tide and disappear from the world's memories.

t_ch: 你没有死，所谓「陨落」只是一场骗局。不惜背离逐火的使命，也要和她搭上关系，为什么？
t_en: So you didn't die. Your "fall" was just a lie. You cast aside your duty as a Flame-Chaser and joined her. Why?

t_ch: 为了生存。对地兽而言，生命不过「存续」二字……
t_en: To survive. For a dromas, life is no more than "existence"...

t_ch: 飞禽、走兽、跨越亘古，艰难求生。却无法像人类一样，在「负世」的记忆中长存。
t_en: The birds and beasts of this world have struggled to survive since time immemorial. Yet, unlike humans, they are unable to live on in the Worldbearer's memories.

t_ch: 但长夜月，她是<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆」的主宰</color>。在「永夜之帷」中，我看见你的故事——
t_en: But Evernight is <color=#dbc291ff>the master of Remembrance</color>, and I saw your story in the Veil of Evernight—

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>█ ██ █持明 █ ██ 不朽 █ 化龙 ██ █ █起死回 █生█ ████ █</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>█ ██ █Vidyadhara █ ██ the Permanence █ dragon transmutation ██ █ █resurrec █tion█ ████ █</color>

t_ch: 死地求生，你选错路了，半神。
t_en: The path you chose to survive will lead to your death, demigod.

t_ch: 那又如何？污浊的金血，浸入此身……
t_en: And what of it? This body is soaked in filthy golden blood...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「大地」饿了，只有「不朽」能填满它的胃袋！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The "Earth" is hungry, and only the Permanence can satisfy it!</color>

t_ch: 这是…错乱的记忆？
t_en: Is this some... disordered memory?
...Ugh!

t_ch: 过往云烟，理应飘散。
t_en: The mists of the past shall drift away.

t_ch: 什么……
t_en: What...

t_ch: 散去，消逝，化作浮沫。
t_en: Scatter, fade, turn to foam.

t_ch: 不记得我了么？
t_en: Do you not remember me?

t_ch: 罢了，我毕竟是你要背负的重责……
t_en: After all, I am the heavy burden you must bear...

t_ch: 如何能被轻易遗落？
t_en: How could I be so easily forsaken?

t_ch: 丹…枫？
t_en: Dan... Feng?

t_ch: 又是窃忆者的把戏？
t_en: Is this another Memosnatcher trick?

t_ch: 持明蜕生本该遗忘前尘旧事，但龙师们当年从中作梗，让「我」残留在你心识深处……
t_en: Vidyadhara are supposed to forget the past during hatching rebirth, but the Preceptors interfered back then and allowed "me" to remain deep in your consciousness.

t_ch: 若不愿提起那染血的旧名，唤我「忘却的记忆」也好。
t_en: If you do not wish to use that bloodstained name, you may call me "Obliviated Memory."

t_ch: …不必了。纵使早已分道扬镳，我也不会忘记你。
t_en: ...That's not necessary. Though we've long parted ways, I won't ever forget you.

t_ch: 所以，那巨人是谁？
t_en: So, who is that giant?

t_ch: 翁法罗斯「大地」的半神。他本该站在我们这边，却受人蛊惑，意图夺取化龙之力。
t_en: That is Amphoreus's "Earth" demigod. He should be on our side, but he was led astray and intends to seize the power of dragon transmutation.

t_ch: 龙临大地，万类仰止。寰宇生灵皆贪图「不朽」，你我再清楚不过。
t_en: The dragon descends upon the earth, and all beings look to it in reverence. You and I know that all life in the universe covets Permanence.

t_ch: 你想说，我会重蹈你的覆辙？
t_en: Are you trying to say I'll end up like you?

t_ch: 总有一天，你会的。依我见，此行终点离那时分相当近了。
t_en: One day you will, and as I see it, that day won't be far from the end of this journey.

t_ch: 结束这个话题吧。我不打算评判「丹枫」，更无意再与他产生纠葛。
t_en: Let's move on to another topic. I have no intention of passing judgment on "Dan Feng," and I have even less desire to become entangled with him again.

t_ch: 现在，我只关心一件事，那就是让伙伴们平安归来。
t_en: I only have one concern right now: bringing my companions back safely.

t_ch: 要么帮我抵御孽物，要么就退回记忆的阴影里去，丹枫。
t_en: You can either help me deal with these abominations or return to the shadows of memory, Dan Feng.

t_ch: 也罢。忆潮残秽仍在肆虐，有我陪同，你在这废墟中也能多一道助力。
t_en: Alright. The filthy remnants of the memoria tide still run rampant. Let me accompany you through these ruins. You could use the help.

t_ch: 那渴求龙之力的巨人，想必也不会善罢甘休。
t_en: And presumably, that giant who craves the power of dragons won't just let things rest.

t_ch: 随你。我要动身了。
t_en: Do as you please. I'm moving ahead.

t_ch: 嘿咻，这下就好了，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}祝福满满，密径可以重新使用啦！
t_en: Phew, it's all good now. {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}'s blessing is full, and the Hidden Passage can be used again!

t_ch: 这样一来，凯撒陛下的军团就可以从树庭发动奇袭了。
t_en: Now, the Imperator's legions can launch a surprise attack from the Grove.

t_ch: 不知道荒笛那边能不能成功呀……
t_en: Who knows if Terravox will be able to succeed...

t_ch: 咦，这位战士，你是……
t_en: Huh? Who is this warrior?

t_ch: 缇里西庇俄丝女士。是我，{NICKNAME}的同伴，丹恒。
t_en: Lady Tribios, I am Dan Heng, {NICKNAME}'s companion.

t_ch: 丹恒？初次见面。{NICKNAME}的伙伴，原来不止小昔涟吗？
t_en: Dan Heng? Nice to meet you. I didn't realize {NICKNAME} had more companions in addition to little Cyrene.

t_ch: 我看，不必多费口舌了。她们和我一样，不过是你的一簇记忆。
t_en: There is no need to elaborate further. They are merely a collection of your memories, just like me.

t_ch: 不对。倘若是我的记忆，她们理应认得我才是。
t_en: No. If they were my memories, they would recognize me.

t_ch: 丹…丹恒？
t_en: Dan... Dan Heng?

t_ch: 虽然*我们*不认识你，但这里马上要发生一场可怕的战斗，还是快去安全的地方吧！
t_en: Even though we don't know you, we'll still ask you to get somewhere safe. A terrible battle is about to break out here.

t_ch: 海瑟音…唔，「剑旗爵」就在前面不远，疏散工作快要完成了。快去吧，不然可能会赶不上。
t_en: Hysilens... I mean, "Dux Gladiorum" is not far ahead. The evacuation efforts are almost over, so go now, or it might be too late.

t_ch: 海瑟音……
t_en: Hysilens...

t_ch: 明白了，我这就去找她。谢谢你们。
t_en: I see. In that case, I'll go look for her now. Thank you.

t_ch: 不客气！*我们*还得去传递讯息，先走了——你要保重喔，丹恒！
t_en: No problem! We need to go deliver some messages, so we'll be off. Please take care, Dan Heng!

t_ch: 记忆的诳语。你怎么看？
t_en: Memory's crazed ramblings. What do you think?

t_ch: 暂时不成结论，但这道回忆显然不属于我。
t_en: It's too early to reach a conclusion, but this memory is most definitely not mine.

t_ch: 两种可能性：它属于<color=#dbc291ff>「荒笛」</color>，或是你苦苦追寻的{NICKNAME}。
t_en: There are two possibilities: This memory either belongs to <color=#dbc291ff>Terravox</color>, or it belongs to {NICKNAME}, the person you're desperately looking for.

t_ch: 但后者的概率，微乎其微。
t_en: But the probability of the latter is very low.

t_ch: 你应该比我清楚，那场决战过后，就连第一位天才都无法断定{F#她}{M#他}何去何从。
t_en: You should know better than I do. After that final battle, even the First Genius couldn't determine where {F#s}he went.

t_ch: 不错。但刚才的对话给了我启发。
t_en: Correct, but the conversation I just had gave me an idea.

t_ch: 且不论「长夜月」。在创世涡心，还有个人和{NICKNAME}一道失去了音讯。
t_en: Let's forget "Evernight" for now. In the Vortex of Genesis, there was someone else who went missing along with {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 我还有机会和<color=#dbc291ff>她</color>取得联络。
t_en: I still have a chance to make contact with <color=#dbc291ff>her</color>.

t_ch: 方法…就在树庭中。
t_en: And the way I'll do it... is right here in the Grove.

t_ch: 就是这里，是时候唤醒我们要找的人了。
t_en: We're here. Now it's time to awaken the person we're looking for.

t_ch: 一汪灵水……
t_en: A pool of spirit water...

t_ch: 原来如此，你准备和这个世界的水域共鸣。
t_en: I see. You plan to resonate with the waters of this world.

t_ch: 和我故乡的洋流相比，翁法罗斯的水体要更…不羁。驯服它的过程有些艰难，还好我已大概摸清了其中的门路。
t_en: Compared to the currents of my home, the waters of Amphoreus are... rather untamed. Subduing the waters wasn't easy, but I've gotten the hang of it now.

t_ch: 「于它狂欢的舞步之下，以盛会的喧嚣……」
t_en: "Under the raucous steps of their frenzied dance, the roar of celebration..."

t_ch: 「…唤起灵水的记忆。」
t_en: "...Calls forth the spirit water's memories."

t_ch: 不可思议……
t_en: How incredible...

t_ch: 翁法罗斯竟还有生者——此人还懂得唤水之术。
t_en: There are still survivors in Amphoreus, and this one even knows how to use the arts of water.

t_ch: 太好了……
t_en: Very good...

t_ch: 很高兴见到您，「海洋」的半神，海瑟音女士。
t_en: It's nice to meet the "Ocean" demigod, Lady Hysilens.

t_ch: 青色的龙鱼…是丹恒？我应该没有记错你的名字。
t_en: A green dragonfish... Are you Dan Heng? I hope I've remembered your name correctly.

t_ch: 鳞渊境是你的家乡，对么？在{NICKNAME}的记忆中，我看见你们并肩而立。
t_en: Scalegorge Waterscape is your home, isn't it? In {NICKNAME}'s memories, I saw you two standing side-by-side.

t_ch: 万幸，这样也能免去自我介绍，直接表明来意了。
t_en: That's fortunate. It means I won't have to introduce myself. I can get straight to the point.

t_ch: 请告诉我，「长夜月」和{NICKNAME}如今身在何方？
t_en: Tell me, where are "Evernight" and {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 那位陌生人在我眼前掠走了「救世主」。我号令众水奔涌追逐，却被层岩阻断了流向……
t_en: The stranger snatched away the "Deliverer" right before my eyes. I commanded the waters to surge after them, but layered cliffs blocked the water's current...

t_ch: 务必小心，「大地」背离了逐火的使命。荒笛依然在世，它绝非「开拓」的盟友。
t_en: You must be careful. "Earth" has abandoned the Flame-Chase mission. Though Terravox still lives, they are not an ally of the Trailblaze.

t_ch: 不意外。那坠入疯狂的半神已和我交过手了。
t_en: That's no surprise. I've already exchanged blows with that mad demigod.

t_ch: 没想到…最坏的状况还是发生了。
t_en: I didn't think... the worst would still come to pass.

t_ch: 不仅如此，他还意图染指{RUBY_B#「不朽」}危险的力量{RUBY_E#}。身为战友，或许你知道他的目的是什么？
t_en: He also intends to get his hands on a {RUBY_B#the power of Permanence}dangerous power{RUBY_E#}. As his comrade-in-arms, do you know what his goal is?

t_ch: 荒笛眼里，从来只有自土地中诞生的生命。贪图天外的不可名状之力，我想动机也不外如是。
t_en: Terravox has only ever cared for life born from this soil. If they covet powers from beyond the sky, I suppose it's out of the same care.

t_ch: 可即便如此，它的举止…也太异常了。
t_en: Even so, their behavior is... far too unusual.

t_ch: 想来，若非油尽灯枯，它也不必如此破釜沉舟。
t_en: I presume they wouldn't have made such a drastic and irreversible decision if they had not exhausted all other means.

t_ch: 但拥抱「不朽」，恐怕只会落得更不幸的下场。
t_en: But embracing the Permanence may result in even more misfortune.

t_ch: 这位半神的意志值得尊敬，但我的立场不会变。
t_en: While I admire that demigod's willpower, my position has not changed.

t_ch: 看来，要找到「长夜月」，与「大地」一战无可避免。既然对方已沦为害兽……
t_en: It seems that if I want to find "Evernight," I will have to confront Earth. Since my opponent has already turned into a vicious beast...

t_ch: 也正好免去我的心理负担。
t_en: What I do won't weigh on my conscience.

t_ch: …那么，丹恒阁下，请允许我的分身一同随行。作为见证此世末路的半神……
t_en: ...Then allow my specter to accompany you, Lord Dan Heng. As the demigod who witnessed the end of this world...

t_ch: 至少，让我亲自为最后一位战友送去挽歌。
t_en: At least let me sing an elegy for my last comrade.

t_ch: 不像你平日会说的话。
t_en: That doesn't sound like something you would normally say.

t_ch: 什么？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: 「正好免去我的心理负担」——言外之意，我能猜到一二。
t_en: "What I do won't weigh on my conscience." I can certainly guess what you mean by that.

t_ch: 为了同伴，我不会有分毫犹豫。
t_en: I will never hesitate for my companions.

t_ch: 我是一名「无名客」，而我要做的事……
t_en: I am a Nameless, and what I'm going to do...

t_ch: 就是捍卫一切行将飘逝的希望。
t_en: Is to defend all the hopes that are on the verge of fading away.

t_ch: 是我失言了。
t_en: Then I misspoke.

t_ch: 星穹列车的「护卫」…理应如此。
t_en: That is exactly how the "guard" of the Astral Express should act.

t_ch: 相比刚才，这里静得有些出奇了。
t_en: It's unusually quiet here compared to before.

t_ch: 别大意，忆潮变得更汹涌了……
t_en: Don't let your guard down. The memoria tide has become even more violent...

t_ch: 那是……
t_en: Is that...

t_ch: …你脑海中遗留的过往，远比我想的更多。
t_en: ...Your mind retains far more of the past than I had imagined.

t_ch: 这场战前告别，我不止一次在梦中见过。
t_en: I've seen this farewell more than once in my dreams.

t_ch: 对于新生的持明，前世只是一场幻戏。你明白这是「你」的记忆，但无法感同身受。
t_en: The previous life is just an immersia to a newly-born Vidyadhara. You know rationally that these are "your" memories, but it doesn't feel like you experienced them yourself.

t_ch: 为一己私欲，擅用化龙之力，让昔日亲友化作仇敌……
t_en: I used dragon transmutation for selfish reasons, and close friends turned to enemies.

t_ch: 你一定会问我：如此代价，是否值得？
t_en: You probably want to ask me if it was worth it.

t_ch: 军务厅对此次「玉阙」之战颇为重视，「曜青」急急召她回去执行斥候任务。
t_en: The Military Affairs Office is placing more importance on the Yuque's battle this time, and the Yaoqing called her back for a patrol mission.

t_ch: 有些人就是血里有风，停不下一时半刻。无妨，她那份我来喝就好！
t_en: Some people are born with adventure in their blood and can't stop for even a moment. No matter, I'll drink her portion for her!

t_ch: 怎么就要举杯了？不等等丹枫吗？
t_en: We're already toasting? Why don't we wait for Dan Feng?

t_ch: 龙尊大人，自然是有无休无止的龙师会议要开，一时半刻散不了场。不等他了。
t_en: As always, the high elder has endless meetings with the Preceptors that he can't get away from. Let's not wait on him.

t_ch: 呸…这不是水吗？！
t_en: Pah... Isn't this just water!?

t_ch: 我转述她的原话：战事当前，贪杯误事，我就先在这儿放一瓮塔拉萨水晶宫的涌泉。
t_en: I'll relay her exact words: It is a mistake to drink too much before a battle, so I'll leave a jar of spring water from Thalassa's crystal palace.

t_ch: 她说，酒要在凯旋后喝才有滋味。
t_en: She said that wine only has flavor after a triumphant return.

t_ch: …你不早说。
t_en: ...Why didn't you say so earlier?

t_ch: 我本来不想的，奈何她非要看看你喝下第一口的表情。
t_en: I didn't want to go along with her, but she insisted on seeing your expression after your first sip.

t_ch: 水也好、酒也罢，若是朋友所赠，便是同等醇厚。
t_en: Any gift from a friend, whether it is water or wine, is rich in flavor all the same.

t_ch: 你每句话都要上价值的旧疾还没痊愈吗？
t_en: I see you still speak as if every sentence must add something of profound value.

t_ch: 来得正好，大家都在等你呢。要不你自罚三杯吧！
t_en: You're just in time! The punishment for making us all wait should be three cups of wine.

t_ch: 饶了我吧，我在古海边喝的苦水还少吗？
t_en: Spare me, please. I've already suffered enough next to the ancient sea.

t_ch: 我已说服龙师们，这一战将有持明云吟士亲赴前线，与我军并肩作战。
t_en: I've convinced the Preceptors: Vidyadhara cloudhymn magi will join the battle on the frontlines, and our armies will fight side-by-side.

t_ch: 看来，你那对付「计都蜃楼」的计划可以实行了，景元。
t_en: It seems like you can now carry out your plan for dealing with the "Ketu Mirage," Jing Yuan.

t_ch: 谢谢你力排众议，丹枫。
t_en: Thank you for standing your ground against the dissenters, Dan Feng.

t_ch: 没想到那些龙师真会松口。此役之后，定然……
t_en: I never thought those Preceptors would ever relent. After all of this, countless Vidyadhara...

t_ch: 定然会有无数持明族有去无回，再无机会蜕鳞重生。这一点每个人都清楚。
t_en: Countless Vidyadhara will lose their lives, with no chance at a molting rebirth. We all understand this.

t_ch: 但是，若不同甘共苦，持明便不能成为联盟命运的一员，而只是他人苦难的旁观者。
t_en: But the Vidyadhara cannot become a part of the Alliance's destiny if we do not share in its joys and sorrows. We would only be bystanders to everyone else's suffering.

t_ch: 这一点，我们每个人同样清楚。
t_en: That is something we all understand as well.

t_ch: 这便是我们相聚在此的理由。来吧，举杯吧，诸位。这一杯不是为我们彼此饯行……
t_en: That is also why we've gathered here. Come, raise your cups. This toast is not for bidding farewell to each other...

t_ch: 而是敬那些不再归还的征人，敬我们的同伴。
t_en: But for honoring the soldiers who will not return, for honoring our companions.

t_ch: 你每句话都要上价值的旧疾还没痊愈吗？
t_en: I see you still speak as if every sentence must add something of profound value.

t_ch: 抱歉，我那乱来的计划一定让你背了很大压力。
t_en: Apologies, my reckless plan must have put a lot of pressure on you.

t_ch: 别说这种话。
t_en: Nonsense.

t_ch: 如果立场转换，不管我的计划多么乱来，你也一定会支持我的。不是吗？
t_en: If our positions were flipped, you'd support me no matter how reckless my plan was, right?

t_ch: 当然。但还是别太乱来吧。
t_en: Of course. But let's try not to be too reckless.

t_ch: 做出这样的决定，总有人会问你「值得吗？」…而你也会反复诘问自己。
t_en: When you make a decision like this, people will always ask, "Was it worth it?"... And you will also forever question yourself.

t_ch: 面对这种问题，你知道该如何回答吗？
t_en: Do you know how you will answer that question?

t_ch: 我不会回答。我会证明。
t_en: I won't answer it. I will prove it.

t_ch: 没错，我以兵锋作答。
t_en: That's right. My sword is my answer.

t_ch: 谢谢你，丹枫！谢谢你，景元！谢谢你，镜流！谢谢你，不知道跑到哪里去了的白珩！
t_en: Thank you, Dan Feng! Thank you, Jing Yuan! Thank you, Jingliu! And thank you, Baiheng, wherever you've run off to!

t_ch: 你这酒鬼，喝些泉水也能喝醉吗？
t_en: Ridiculous, how did you get drunk from spring water?

t_ch: 哼，我只是觉得痛快！好似打造出一件良工神兵般畅快！
t_en: Hmph, I'm just full of joy! It feels like I've just forged a divine weapon with masterful craftsmanship!

t_ch: 「宁如飞萤赴火，不作樗木长春」…过去，我打心底里一直这么觉得。但，多亏遇见了你们，我从未像现在这样，切实地感到自己正在活着。
t_en: "I'd rather leave this world in a blaze than live until the end of time..." That's what I always firmly believed in the past. But I never truly felt like I was alive until I met all of you.

t_ch: 我从没这么想要多活片刻——不成，这话可说不得！
t_en: Now I wish more than anything that I could just live a bit longer. No, pretend I didn't say that!

t_ch: 结束了。
t_en: It's over.

t_ch: 这五人后来的命运，你也一清二楚。
t_en: And you know exactly what happened to these five afterward.

t_ch: 所以，在{NICKNAME}和三月七也离你而去的当下，你能理解了么？
t_en: So, can you understand it now, after both {NICKNAME} and March 7th have left you?

t_ch: 失去休戚与共的挚友，绝对称不上胜利，那只是一场折磨终生的失败。这种命运，我绝不接受。
t_en: Losing a dear friend with whom you've shared so much can never be considered a victory. It's a failure that torments you for the rest of your life. I could never accept that kind of fate.

t_ch: 你做出了选择。
t_en: So you made a decision.

t_ch: 使用化龙妙法的，是我。发誓要将白珩带回世间的，是我。
t_en: I was the one who used the Transmutation Arcanum. I was the one who swore to bring Baiheng back to life.

t_ch: 令一切走向无可挽回的，也是我。
t_en: And the one who brought everything past the point of no return... that was also me.

t_ch: 丹枫，你心中可有一丝悔意？
t_en: Do you have any regrets, Dan Feng?

t_ch: 就算光阴能够倒转，我也不会做出第二种选择。
t_en: Even if I could reverse time, I would not choose differently.

t_ch: 倘若战死的是镜流、景元…乃至应星，我的答案亦是如此。
t_en: And if it had been Jingliu, Jing Yuan... or even Yingxing who died in battle, I'd still choose to do the same thing.

t_ch: 因为只有我能做出选择，能捍卫这一切。现在，为了同伴，为了与你同行的那两人……
t_en: Because only I could make that choice and protect all of this. Now, for the sake of your companions, for the sake of those two who walk alongside you...

t_ch: 丹恒，你愿意做出多少牺牲？
t_en: How much are you willing to sacrifice, Dan Heng?

t_ch: 一切。
t_en: Everything.

t_ch: 这回答，毫不意外。
t_en: Your answer does not surprise me.
